# Patel Engineering & Earthmovers

A modern, high-performance multi-page website for a heavy equipment rental and earthmoving service provider based in Morbi, Gujarat.

## Project Overview
This project is a professional portfolio and inquiry platform for Patel Engineering & Earthmovers, a company with over 25 years of experience in the construction industry. It showcases their fleet, past projects, and major clients.

## Tech Stack
- **Frontend Framework:** React 18 with Vite
- **Routing:** React Router v7
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS v4, custom CSS modules
- **Animations:** Motion (Framer Motion)
- **Icons:** Lucide React
- **UI Components:** Radix UI, Material UI (MUI)
- **Image Management:** Cloudinary (custom utility for optimized delivery)
- **Deployment:** Vercel (SPA rewrite configured in `vercel.json`)

## Key Features
- **Dynamic SEO:** Custom utility to update meta tags, Open Graph data, and canonical URLs per page.
- **Structured Data:** Automated JSON-LD injection for LocalBusiness, Service, and Breadcrumb schemas to enhance search visibility.
- **Inquiry System:** Contact form integrated with Google Apps Script for automated lead tracking in Google Sheets and instant email notifications.
- **Optimized Media:** Automatic generation of optimized image and video URLs using Cloudinary.
- **Responsive Design:** Mobile-first architecture with dedicated navigation and UI patterns.
- **Interactive Gallery:** Support for both photo and video action shots of machinery.

## Project Structure
- `/src/app/pages`: Individual page components (Home, About, Services, Projects, Clients, Gallery, Testimonials, Contact).
- `/src/app/components`: Layout components like `RootLayout` (Header, Footer, Nav).
- `/src/utils`: Core utilities for SEO, Cloudinary, and Structured Data.
- `/src/styles`: Global variables and base typography.

## Core Services
- Hanomag K7 Dozer Rental
- Heavy Excavator Services
- Vibratory Roller Rental
- Site Preparation and Grading
